summary: TC1 - Frontend root route returns success
description: Verify the deployed frontend root route loads successfully.

summary: TC2 - API health endpoint returns success
TC3 - Database health endpoint returns success
description: Verify /api/health/database returns HTTP 200 when the test database is reachable.

summary: TC5 - Anonymous dashboard access redirects to login
description: Verify an unauthenticated user navigating to /dashboard is redirected to /login.

summary: TC6 - Student registration and login journey
description: Verify a student can register, open courses, sign out, and sign in again.

summary: TC7 - Sign up requires terms agreement
description: Based on report sign-up TC2: registration must show an error when the user does not accept terms.

summary: TC8 - Sign up rejects invalid email format
description: Based on report sign-up TC13: invalid email format must be blocked before registration is submitted.

summary: TC9 - Sign up rejects weak password
description: Based on report sign-up TC7: weak password must show a password validation error.

summary: TC10 - Sign up rejects invalid phone number
description: Based on report sign-up TC11: invalid phone number must show a validation error.

summary: TC11 - Sign up requires full name
description: Based on report sign-up TC16: blank full name must be blocked by required validation.

summary: TC12 - Admin login redirects to dashboard
description: Based on report login success cases: an admin account must be redirected to the admin area after login.
Based on report login failure cases: wrong credentials must show a login error.
Based on report login blank-password cases: blank password must be blocked by required validation.

summary: TC15 - Admin can create a student
description: Based on report add-user TC1: admin can create a student from the add-user modal.

summary: TC16 - Admin add-user rejects invalid email
description: Based on report add-user TC14: invalid email in the add-user modal must be blocked by validation.

summary: TC17 - AI exercise creator requires topic
description: Based on report exercise TC15: AI exercise creation cannot be submitted without a topic.

summary: TC18 - AI exercise creator exposes language and level controls
description: Based on report exercise TC8/TC9: language and level controls are available before generating exercises.
